title: Ultimate Chaos Progression Mod
description: aims to add as much progression alongside & past netherite
body:
# Ultimate Chaos Progression Mod

### WORK IN PROGRESS !

## Gear & Progression based Mod
this mod focuses on adding progression for gear before, along and after netherite. so far the mod is in an early state, only adding a few armor & tool sets aswell as a few utility items, but we're working on more things :>
as you can tell by it's name it isn't a serious project but we're still trying to make it high quality
this mod was made using Mcreator, you can download it using the link below

[Mcreator latest download](https://mcreator.net/download)

## How/Where to use the mod
No dependencies needed, just download the mod and add it to your modpack. the mod is good to use in any modpack, in vanilla+/tech modpacks for a little extra things to do or to help you survive in challenging modpacks, we recommend using JEI to view recipes and having mods to chose between recipes as steel & copper armor & tool recipes may override recipes of other mod's copper & steel equipment

## Armor/Tools list
### Copper Gear :
made from copper, a nice step between iron and stone
![Copper Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef5104217c307db570c4b36faa57292636ccad3_0.webp)
### Amethyst Gear :
made from amethyst components, music discs and a small amount of diamond in the form of shards, a cheaper and slightly weaker alternative to diamond gear, useful in modpacks that make getting diamonds difficult, the amethyst armor will be used for a later armor set in the mod
![Amethyst Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef5b646223e80d63c5be3ec3efb44b0b8a4fd3e4_0.webp)
### Steel Armor :
made from a few diamonds, coal and iron, another usable diamond alternative, the step between iron and amethyst, steel itself will be used to upgrade amethyst armor in later updates
![Steel Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0434b2bf54bf0df10c46409d397a944169a58a65_0.webp)
### Scorched Netherite Gear :
the current strongest gear in the mod, made from upgrading netherite gear with a lot of nether materials, has fire based abilities [fire resistance for armor, stronger form of fire aspect for the sword]
![Scorched Netherite Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5952a376837603ec5366a61785370e62c47cd48_0.webp)
### Obsidian Gear :
on par with scorched netherite in terms of strenght, also has tools!
made from amethyst gear and a small amount of netherite and obsidian plates, needing a whole lot of diamonds to make, or you can also craft it without netherite but you'll need a diamond gear instead of amethyst
![Obsidian Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b96e963a6bf987b19b502ae9e0a0ea873b2e9e_0.webp)
# Hope you'll enjoy using the mod !
